_comment: Copy this file to config/profile.json and fill in your details. Leave any field blank to omit it.
name: Your Name
background: e.g. 5 years Python, new to ML, building personal AI tools
communication_style: e.g. concise answers, no filler phrases, structured output preferred
preferences: e.g. code examples before theory, short definitions first
dont: e.g. no unsolicited opinions, no excessive caveats
